Description:en: Long-acting antiretroviral medication used to treat HIV-1 infection.
Long-acting PrEP (Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis) is HIV prevention that uses medications designed to protect against HIV infection for weeks or months at a time, instead of requiring a daily pill.
Medication used to treat prostate cancer, especially advanced forms that have spread or no longer respond well to standard hormone therapy.
Medication that reduces the production of certain body fluids by inhibiting the enzyme carbonic anhydrase.
Medication used mainly as a mucolytic (to loosen thick mucus) and as an antidote for paracetamol overdose.
Sterile protein solution obtained from human blood plasma, used medically to restore or maintain blood volume and plasma protein levels.
A broad-spectrum antibiotic used to treat serious bacterial infections, especially those caused by Gram-negative bacteria.
Medication used to treat allergic conditions, particularly allergic rhinitis (hay fever) and allergic conjunctivitis.
A medication used to treat anxiety and related conditions.
A corticosteroid medication used to reduce inflammation in the body, especially in the airways and digestive system.
A combination medication used to treat breathing disorders, especially Asthma and Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD).
Bupivacaine is a local anesthetic medication used to block pain in a specific part of the body during medical procedures or surgery.
Medication used mainly to treat breathing problems in premature infants, especially Apnea of Prematurity.
Is a broad-spectrum antibiotic used to treat serious bacterial infections.
Is an antiseptic and disinfectant used to kill or inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi on the skin, in the mouth, or on surfaces.
A specific form of chlorhexidine commonly used as an antiseptic and disinfectant for the skin, mouth, and medical equipment.
As a form of vitamin D3, an essential vitamin that helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus, which are critical for healthy bones and teeth.
Is a combination medication used primarily in ear and eye infections.
Is a fertility medication used to stimulate ovulation (the release of eggs from the ovaries) in women who have difficulty ovulating.
Is an immunosuppressant medication used to suppress the immune system in order to prevent it from attacking the body or transplanted organs.
Is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
Is an opioid pain medication used to relieve moderate to severe pain and sometimes to suppress cough.
Is a medication primarily used to treat seizure disorders, bipolar disorder, and prevent migraines.
Is a low molecular weight heparin (LMWH) anticoagulant used to prevent and treat blood clots.
Is a sympathomimetic drug that stimulates the nervous system and heart. It is used to treat low blood pressure, nasal congestion, and sometimes asthma.
Is a prescription medication used to treat depression and anxiety disorders.
Is a simple alcohol commonly found in alcoholic beverages and used in medical, industrial, and laboratory applications.
Is a corticosteroid (steroid) medication used primarily in the eye to reduce inflammation.
Is a long-acting injectable antipsychotic used to treat schizophrenia and other chronic psychotic disorders.
Is a colorless, strong-smelling chemical gas commonly used as a disinfectant, preservative, and industrial chemical.
Is a broad-spectrum antibiotic used to treat serious bacterial infections caused mainly by gram-negative bacteria.
Is a medication that reduces secretions and relaxes smooth muscles. It is commonly used in anesthesia and to treat certain respiratory conditions.
Is an anticoagulant (blood thinner) used to prevent and treat blood clots.
Is a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure.
Is a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and reduce cardiovascular risk.
Is a volatile anesthetic gas used to induce and maintain general anesthesia during surgery.
Is a dissociative anesthetic used to induce and maintain anesthesia, provide pain relief, and, in some cases, treat depression.
Is a nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used for short-term management of moderate to severe pain.
Is an anticonvulsant (antiepileptic) medication used to control seizures and stabilize mood.
Is a disease-modifying antirheumatic drug (DMARD) used to treat autoimmune joint diseases by reducing inflammation and slowing disease progression.
Is a medication used to treat epilepsy (seizure disorders).
Is a medication used as a local anesthetic and antiarrhythmic agent.
Is an antibiotic used to treat serious infections caused by gram-positive bacteria, especially those resistant to other antibiotics.
Is a medication and medical substance used mainly as an osmotic diuretic.
Is a short-acting benzodiazepine medication used primarily for sedation, anxiety relief, and seizure control.
Is a prescription antidepressant used mainly to treat major depressive disorder and certain anxiety disorders.
Is a topical corticosteroid used to reduce inflammation, redness, swelling, and itching in various conditions.
Is a topical antibiotic used to treat bacterial skin infections.
Is an immunosuppressant drug used to reduce the body’s immune response.
Is a medication that stimulates muscles and the nervous system by increasing the amount of a chemical called acetylcholine.
Is a preparation of antibodies (immunoglobulins) derived from healthy human plasma. It provides passive immunity to help the body fight infections.
Is an antipsychotic medication used to manage certain mental health conditions.
Is a combination medicine used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension).
Is a triple combination pill used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension), especially when a single drug or dual therapy isn’t enough.
Is a synthetic plasma volume expander used to treat or prevent low blood volume (hypovolemia).
Is a short-acting intravenous anesthetic used to induce and maintain general anesthesia or sedation.
Is a medication used to reverse the effects of heparin, a blood-thinning drug.
Is an antidepressant medication used to treat a variety of mental health conditions.
Is a volatile inhalational anesthetic used to induce and maintain general anesthesia.
Is a medication and fluid used to restore electrolytes, maintain acid-base balance, and expand blood volume.
Is a short-acting muscle relaxant used during anesthesia to facilitate procedures like intubation.
Is the active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) in tacrolimus formulations, used to suppress the immune system in various medical contexts.
Is a medication used to improve urine flow in men with an enlarged prostate.
Is a medication used to improve heart function in patients with angina (chest pain).
Is an eye drop combination used to dilate the pupil for diagnostic or surgical procedures.
Is a long-acting injectable antipsychotic used for the maintenance treatment of schizophrenia and chronic psychotic disorders.
Is a medication used to lower intraocular pressure in the eye and promote eyelash growth in some formulations.
Is a combination eye drop used to lower intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients with glaucoma or ocular hypertension.

Fully specified name:en: ESOMEPRAZOLE AND CLARITHROMYCIN AND AMOXYCILLIN COMBINATION KIT
Description:en: Is a combination treatment (often called triple therapy) used to eradicate Helicobacter pylori infection in the stomach.
Is an active form of vitamin B12 used to support nerve function and red blood cell production.
Is a cardioselective beta-blocker used mainly to treat high blood pressure and heart conditions.
Is an oral medication used to manage type 2 diabetes mellitus.
Is a combination medication used to manage type 2 diabetes mellitus, especially when monotherapy is not sufficient.

Are a fixed-dose oral combination antimalarial medicine containing dihydroartemisinin (a fast-acting artemisinin derivative) and piperaquine (a long-acting antimalarial), used for the treatment of uncomplicated malaria caused by plasmodium falciparum.
